ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's official website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO or the person in charge */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the division */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the division was established */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the division's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carlines" (
  "carline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carline */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the carline belongs to */,
  "carline_name" TEXT /* Name of the carline */,
  "introduction_year" INTEGER /* Year the carline was introduced */,
  "discontinued_year" INTEGER /* Year the carline was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Market segment the carline targets */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the carline's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carlines_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "carline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the carline the model belongs to */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the model */,
  "engine_displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "cylinder_count" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "city_fuel_efficiency" INTEGER /* City fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "highway_fuel_efficiency" INTEGER /* Highway fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "combined_fuel_efficiency" INTEGER /* Combined fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive system */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Engine horsepower */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Engine torque */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Vehicle weight in kilograms */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Vehicle length in millimeters */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Vehicle width in millimeters */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Vehicle height in millimeters */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" INTEGER /* Fuel tank capacity in liters */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard the vehicle meets */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended (if applicable) */,
  "base_price" INTEGER /* Base price of the vehicle in the manufacturer's currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_carline_id FOREIGN KEY ("carline_id") REFERENCES carlines ("carline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
